channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lights in the car park., 1st April
item.description:
In the car park 20 light bulbs are not working.I just took over the block from other caretaker so I don't know if this is any fault or the light bulbs just need to be changed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlyle Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree requires pruning, 1st April
item.description:
I have reported this on a number of occasions. The last email I received stated that appropriate action had been taken. Can you please explain what this appropriate action was?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laburnum Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuing accumulation of fly tipped furniture, 1st April
item.description:
Reported yesterday, but this morning already new items have been dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New Inn Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 1st April
item.description:
This house leaves their rubbish outside and doesn't have the appropriate bins. Foxes have attacked their rubbish, please can we get this sorted?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped, 1st April
item.description:
Fly tipping has taken place outside number 59 Crown Lane. Please can this be investigated and cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roof tile loose, 1st April
item.description:
Roof tile on pagoda building immediately next to the Crayford Click Tower has slipped. 1. May continue to slide off roof and potentially injure anyone walking underneath. 2. May be allowing water ingress to the roof space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Crayford Road, Crayford, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Advertising Flypost, 1st April
item.description:
Correx board flyposted high on the lamppost. Will probably need steps to cut it down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone is regularly dropping dog pooh bags in the alleyway, 1st April
item.description:
There is a mound of dog pooh bags that have been dropped in the alleyway which links Caygill Close to Chiltern Gardens and it is getting bigger by the day. This is a disgusting thing and it is a local doing it. perhaps a notice sign placed either end of the alleyway and a letter to residents in Caygill Close and Chiltern Gardens will stop this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Caygill Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large pothole in front of house 55 Axminster Road, Welling., 1st April
item.description:
Residents complained that this pothole has been there for over 5 months and it is degenerating.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Axminster Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cannister bbq rubbish left, 1st April
item.description:
Rubbish left from bbq

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edmund Halley Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car not loved in over a year, 1st April
item.description:
Car has not moved it over a year. Covered in dirt and taking up A parking space. Please can this be moved. Residents are fighting for spaces in this area. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwood Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking parking gate., 1st April
item.description:
This person is blocking the gates that lead to our car park for over one hour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 31/03/26 21:16 Pothole Lat/Long - 51.4174001, -0.0809471 what3words - settle.loaf.above Nearest address - 93A, Church Road, Anerley, London, SE19 2TA Pothole outside the door of 93A. Causes rain water to be splashed on and underneath properties door. Reference - 5386502 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 06/03/2026 16:13 Pothole outside the door of 93A. Causes rain water to be splashed on and underneath properties door. 31/03/2026 21:15 This has still not been fixed. Whenever heavy vehicles run over the pothole (which is very often) it shakes the entire building. When sitting on the sofa it is like somebody kicking you in the back or a mini earthquake. I can only imagine what it's doing to the old building itself. It's making it very difficult to sleep and relax.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Alma Place, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 1st April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 31/03/26 19:43 Pothole Lat/Long - 51.4161807, -0.0275512 what3words - fires.sugar.comb Nearest address - 1 Brackens, 4 Brackley Road, Beckenham, BR3 1UA Pot holes Reference - 5454489 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 31/03/2026 19:42 Pot holes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipping by bridge, 1st April
item.description:
Large bag full of waste dumped by railway bridge on Green Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Whole series of pothole repairs crumbling away, 1st April

Potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigham Vale, Tulse Hill, Greater London

item.title: Outsdie 4 Prince Arthgur Road NW36AU, 1st April
item.description:
Pavement slabs are being lifted, by roots of a tree, and are endangering a gas pipe cover.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince Arthur Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 31/03/26 19:42 Pothole Lat/Long - 51.4224963, -0.0272237 what3words - sunset.rival.strut Nearest address - 191 Worsley Bridge Road, Beckenham, BR3 1RL Pot holes in road contractor fix four left 3 Not sure what the point of that was Would made sense to fix the location Reference - 5454481 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 31/03/2026 19:42 Pot holes in road contractor fix four left 3 Not sure what the point of that was Would made sense to fix the location
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter and no public bins, 1st April
item.description:
Hillbrow Road is unsealed and continually littered. I have cleaned this up myself a few times but I am elderly and have a disability. The lane way and small green area leading to Hillbrow road behind the garage on London Road is full of bottles and rubbish and even dog poo bags. This little park area needs a bin. I cleaned it up a few months ago but cannot do it again for health reasons - arthritis and bending.This has been an issue for at least 18 months since I moved here.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillbrow Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
